text.title: Earned Value Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Are cost baseline + EV method + AC feed in place?

conclusion.verdict: Use velocity / burn-up for agile or assemble missing inputs

branch.when: inputs_ready == true AND ev_method_locked == true AND threshold_set == false
inputs_ready == true AND ev_method_locked == true AND threshold_set == true

conclusion.verdict: Compute EVM + draft report with justified EAC

example.trace: inputs_ready=true → ev_method_locked=true → SPI=0.85 < 0.9 → corrective action plan triggered.
